zh.North Ormsby, Lincolnshire, England, Uni: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾諾斯 奧姆斯比
zh.lifeSummary: 當Leuca de Mohaut於1202年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾艾爾福德時，她的父親Roger de Mohaut24歲，母親Nichole de Rising28歲。她於1217年與Philip de Orreby II在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾諾斯 奧姆斯比結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1227年在她的家鄉享年25歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Leuca de Mohaut于1202年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾艾爾福德时，她的父亲Roger de Mohaut24岁，母亲Nichole de Rising28岁。她于1217年与Philip de Orreby II在英国英格兰林可爾史爾諾斯 奧姆斯比结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1227年在她的家乡享年25岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Leuca
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Luke  , now also used in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Luke
meanings: Middle English vernacular form of Lucas , Latin form of the post-classical Greek name Loukas ‘man from Lucania’. This owes its perennial popularity throughout Christian Europe to the fact that, from the 2nd century onwards, the third gospel in the New Testament has been ascribed to the Lucas or Luke mentioned at various places in Acts and in the Epistles. Little is known about him beyond the facts that he was a doctor, a Gentile, and a friend and convert of St Paul. The name was borne by the character Luke Skywalker in the film Star Wars ( 1977 ), and rose sharply in popularity in the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: When Leuca de Mohaut was born in 1202, in Elford, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Roger de Mohaut, was 24 and her mother, Nichole de Rising, was 28. She married Philip de Orreby II in 1217, in North Ormsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1227, in her hometown, at the age of 25.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Leuca de Mohaut est née en 1202, à Elford, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger de Mohaut, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Nichole de Rising, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Philip de Orreby II en 1217, à North Ormsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1227, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 25 ans.

de.North Ormsby, Lincolnshire, England, Uni: North Ormsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Leuca de Mohaut 1202 in Elford, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger de Mohaut 24 und ihre Mutter Nichole de Rising 28. Sie hat 1217 in North Ormsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Philip de Orreby II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1227 im Alter von 25 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

Lei sposato Philip de Orreby II nel 1217, nel North Ormsby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1227, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 25 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Leuca de Mohautが1202年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアエルフォードで生まれた時，父Roger de Mohautは24歳，母Nichole de Risingは28歳であった。1217年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアノース オルムスビーでPhilip de Orreby IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1227年に故郷で25歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Leuca de Mohaut(이)가 1202년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 엘퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger de Mohaut(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Nichole de Rising(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1217년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 노르스 오스비에서 Philip de Orreby II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1227년 그녀의 고향에서 25세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Philip de Orreby II em 1217, em North Ormsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Leuca de Mohaut родилась в 1202 г. в местности элфорд, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Roger de Mohaut было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Nichole de Rising, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Philip de Orreby II в 1217 г. в местности норт ормсби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1227 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 25 лет.

Se casó con Philip de Orreby II en 1217, en North Ormsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1227, en su pueblo, a la edad de 25 años.
